name: revit_renumber_setout_points
description: Renumber major setout point instances with an SOP prefix starting at one.

prefix.description: Label prefix for renumbered points (default: SOP )

host_element_ids.description: Optional filter to renumber only points hosted on these elements

notes: Targets family instances of the major SetoutPoint symbol. No-op with a dialog if the family is not loaded.
